next_steps: 18F-FDG PET/CT scan to guide biopsy site selection
Endobronchial ultrasound (EBUS)-guided transbronchial needle aspiration of mediastinal/hilar lymph nodes
Cardiac MRI with late gadolinium enhancement to evaluate for cardiac sarcoidosis
Serum levels of angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE), calcium, and 1,25-dihydroxyvitamin D
Fungal serology and Quantiferon-TB Gold testing
Comprehensive rheumatologic panel (ESR, CRP, ANA, RF, anti-CCP, IgG4 levels)
